title: Extra Select Complete Koi Sticks Fish Food Tub, 5 Litre
features: Balanced Diet: A complete pond food with balanced protein and fats, for all fish sizes, large and small.
Immune System Support: Packed with Vitamin E and C for vitality, ideal fish food pond sticks for happy fish.
Floating Sticks: Floats on top of your fish pond, easy to remove to prevent overfeeding.
Enhanced Colouration: Koi carp food formulated with algae for a vibrant outdoor fish pond.
Versatile Fish Sticks: Ideal koi fish food, and also other pond fish and goldfish pellets.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select: Koi Sticks Ingredients Cereals, derivatives of vegetable origin, meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives, minerals, oils and fats, algae. Analytical Crude Protein 27%, Crude Fats 4.5%, Crude Fibre 2.5%, Crude Ash 7.5%, Vitamin A 8400IU, Vitamin D 4900 IU, Vitamin E 322 IU, Vitamin C 350mg Feeding Guide Feed outdoor fish 2-3 times daily in summer, once daily during spring and autumn, and cease in winter. For indoor fish, feed all year round, providing only what they can consume within a few minutes to avoid overfeeding. Handy Tips Seasonal Feeding: Adjust quantity and frequency with the seasons. Oxygen Boost: Include moving water features to enhance oxygen levels. Responsibility Lesson: Great for teaching kids care and kindness. Clean Regularly: Maintain pond cleanliness for fish health and vibrancy. For Ornamental Fish Ideal for all ornamental fish providing a comprehensive and balanced diet that caters to the diverse needs of pond inhabitants. Balanced Nutrition Packed with essential vitamins and minerals, these sticks support overall health, growth, and vitality in ornamental fish, especially koi. Floating Orange Sticks Vibrant orange sticks that float, making it easier for all types of pond fish to feed while enhancing the visibility to prevent overfeeding.
